features.name: Supabase migration: browser_command_queue table (id, platform, action, params jsonb, status, priority, created_at, claimed_at, completed_at)
Supabase migration: browser_results table (id, command_id, platform, action, result jsonb, created_at)
Cloud bridge daemon: cloud-bridge.js polls browser_command_queue every 10s, claims rows, routes to correct local service
Route handlers: instagram->:3005, twitter->:3003, tiktok->:3006, threads->:3004, linkedin->chrome-search.js, upwork->safari
Result writer: after each command, INSERT into browser_results + UPDATE command status=done/failed
Rate limiter: max 100 commands/hour, skip excess with status=rate_limited, resume next window
Command allowlist validation: only known platform+action combos accepted, unknown commands set status=rejected
launch-cloud-bridge.sh: start|stop|status with 10s polling and PID management
Backend route: GET /api/bridge/status — { pending, processing, done_today, failed_today, rate_limit_remaining }
Dashboard panel: Cloud Bridge section showing command throughput + recent command log table
